message:
feat(demo_showcase): implement LogFormatter with styled output (bd-32pp)

Add LogFormatter for styled, aligned log entry formatting:
- Color-coded log levels: ERROR/WARN pop (bold), INFO uses info style,
  TRACE/DEBUG muted
- Configurable column widths via LogColumnWidths
- No-color mode support via without_color()
- format() for basic output, format_with_fields() for structured fields
- Target truncation with ellipsis for long component names

Also includes:
- Remove unused JobKind import from jobs.rs
- Format fixes from cargo fmt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
